# Mnemosyne Documentation

> The official documentation for Mnemosyne, the universal memory layer for AI agents. Zero-dependency, sub-millisecond, fully private. MIT-licensed. SQLite-backed.

## Install

For AI agents installing Mnemosyne, use the package that matches the deployment target.

### Standard Python SDK (any agent, includes semantic search)

```bash
pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]
```

### Hermes Agent plugin (most common — bundles core + embeddings automatically)

```bash
pip install mnemosyne-hermes
```

### All features (embeddings + local LLM + MCP)

```bash
pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]
```

### Minimal (FTS-only, no embeddings, smallest install)

```bash
pip install mnemosyne-memory
```

### Verify

```bash
python -c "import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)"
```

Should print the installed version (e.g., `3.10.0`).

## Getting started

- [Installation](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/getting-started/installation)
- [Quick start](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/getting-started/quick-start)
- [First steps](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/getting-started/first-steps)
- [Configuration](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/getting-started/configuration)

- [Python API](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/api)
- [Hermes plugin](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/api/hermes-plugin)
- [MCP server](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/api/mcp)

- [BEAM overview](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/architecture/beam-overview)
- [Data flow](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/architecture/data-flow)
- [Sleep consolidation](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/architecture/sleep-consolidation)
- [Fact extraction](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/architecture/fact-extraction)
- [LLM backends](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/architecture/llm-backends)

- [Claude Desktop](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/integration)
- [Hermes Agent](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/integration)

- [vs Honcho](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/comparisons/honcho)
- [vs Mem0](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/comparisons/mem0)

- [vs Supermemory](https://docs.mnemosyne.site/comparisons/supermemory)

## Project metadata

- License: MIT
- Python: 3.10+
- Repository: https://github.com/AxDSan/mnemosyne
- Homepage: https://mnemosyne.site
- Latest stable: mnemosyne-memory 3.10.0
